Eden

Research intelligence and prioritization.

Eden is a standalone local-first system for aggregating, analyzing, prioritizing, and evaluating sources—screen recordings, video, articles, images, and your own material—with Steward grounding what matters to you.

Research software—not a feature inside finance

Eden is its own product: a local-first system for aggregating, analyzing, prioritizing, and evaluating sources. It does not “belong to” CFO or Ledger; it addresses a different class of work entirely.

Content is broken into claims, facts, and context. Summaries stay tied to sources. Outputs are structured so you can see where each piece came from.

What Eden ingests

  • Screen recordings
  • Videos—local files or from platforms such as YouTube, Rumble, Vimeo, Instagram (public/free content)
  • Articles and written material
  • Images and screenshots
  • Your own files alongside material you point it at

Eden transcribes audio, extracts text with OCR, and compiles structured research outputs with citations.

Steward prioritizes what matters to you

Steward is logic-driven, not open-ended generation. In Eden it helps prioritize facts using your context—so the same corpus can be ordered differently for different questions.

Sources are evaluated for consistency, evidence support, cross-source agreement, and relevance to your situation. Eden does not replace your judgment; it makes the landscape legible.

What Eden is not

  • It does not write papers or replace authorship.
  • It does not make subjective judgments about people.
  • It does not bypass paywalls or access restricted content.

Related products, separate missions

CFO is the financial operating system. Ledger is the identity vault and deterministic document layer. Eden shares Steward with them but answers a different question: how to turn diverse sources into prioritized, citable research—on your machine, under your control.

CFO Ledger Compare all

In development

Not available for purchase, download, or access. This is being built.

Currently being built
